source_analysis: gateway/main.go is the sole entrypoint but is also structurally isolated (total_degree=0) — it has no resolved import edges to the services it should orchestrate. service_auth/auth.go and service_billing/billing.go are isolated service modules with no inbound edges. There are no bridges, boundaries, or hotspots: the topology is fully disconnected. This is a critical structural finding — an entrypoint disconnected from its service graph. target_system_profile.yml is an isolated config file (non-code, not an interpretation target). Paths are canonical builder form; the scorecard strips a leading input/ prefix when comparing.

target_basis.gateway/main.go: orphaned entrypoint — declared entry surface with no resolved dependency edges to the services it should orchestrate; the wiring defect is at the gateway, not the services
target_basis.service_auth/auth.go: isolated service module — no inbound structural edges, unreachable from the entrypoint in the resolved graph
target_basis.service_billing/billing.go: isolated service module — no inbound structural edges, unreachable from the entrypoint in the resolved graph
